description: This is the one you’ve been waiting for! Don’t miss this beautifully cared-for 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom townhome in an unbeatable location, just steps from schools, parks, shopping, and entertainment. The open-concept main floor features a bright island kitchen, an updated powder room, a cozy gas fireplace, and access to a charming fenced yard with a covered deck, perfect for relaxing or summer BBQs. Upstairs, you’ll find three bedrooms, including a generously sized primary bedroom ideal for family living. Recent upgrades include updated bathrooms with new flooring, refreshed tub and shower finishes, fresh paint throughout, and a newer hot water tank making this home truly move-in ready. The 2 car tandem garage offers built-in steel storage shelving for added convenience.
